case_title: PAYCO-GENERAL AMERICAN CREDITS, INC. vs. YOUNGER, LAJUENE et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAYCO-GENERAL AMERICAN CREDITS, INC.
